data.current_description: Converts HTML content or a URL to a PDF document.

data.description_suggestion: Converts HTML content or a URL to a PDF document. Accepts either raw HTML markup or a URL as input via the ConvertRequest schema. The operation processes the input asynchronously and generates a downloadable PDF file.
